expectations.text: At least one specialist community / long-term user source, not SEO listicles
expectations.evidence: HN, Lobsters, Keebio community used after Reddit/SearXNG access failures; 16 URLs.

expectations.text: Each recommended product supported by 2+ independent sources
Findings carry confidence levels and a Sources section

expectations.evidence: 'Longest real-world wrist-pain track record' framing on the Freestyle2; HN long-term users on the MD770.

notes: Resourceful under tool failures (SearXNG down, Reddit blocked). Good picks; also called out Q11's missing tenting. Lower dating density (4 dated lines vs 14).
